<?php namespace Illuminate\Foundation\Bootstrap; use Illuminate\Contracts\Foundation\Application; use Illuminate\Foundation\AliasLoader; use Illuminate\Foundation\PackageManifest; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Facade; class RegisterFacades { /** * Bootstrap the given application. * * @param \Illuminate\Contracts\Foundation\Application $app * @return void */ public function bootstrap(Application $app) { Facade::clearResolvedInstances(); Facade::setFacadeApplication($app); AliasLoader::getInstance(array_merge( $app->make('config')->get('app.aliases', []), $app->make(PackageManifest::class)->aliases() ))->register(); } }
